known_issues: Build failures occurred when attempting to implement collective offerings feature - may need simplified approach

existing_features.title: Add a 'Ofiary zbiorowe' (Collective Offerings) tab to the expanded locality card in the Miejscowości section
Create a form in the Collective Offerings tab to add new collective offerings with amount, date, and description fields
Automatically create a budget transaction entry when a collective offering is added or edited in Miejscowości
Display collective offerings in the Budzet section with clear indication of their source locality
Allow editing and deleting collective offerings from the locality card with automatic budget synchronization

new_feature_requests.summary: Add 'Ofiary zbiorowe' (collective offerings) tab to Miejscowości section, with automatic synchronization to Budżet section
Store collective offerings in the backend with locality ID, amount, date, description, and timestamps
